title: Amazon India is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Amazon India is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Amazon India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated E-commerce Executive to strengthen our Madurai-based team.

About Amazon India:
Amazon India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Magento

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Amazon India!
